Anac..Chill, trembling and shivering: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.
Anac..Extremities: Sensations as of a hoop or band around the body, limbs or head; pressing as of a plug.
Anac..Generalities: The whole body has been well covered by symptoms; but it seems that the mind represents the principal aspect, and A will seldom be used excepting for such mind symptoms.
Anac..Generalities, weakness, enervation: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.
Anac..Head: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.
Anac..Mind: This remedy is full of strange notions and ideas. The mind appears to be feeble; almost, if not complete imbecility; seems as if in a dream; everything is strange; slow to comprehend. Marked irritability; disturbed by everything; cursing.
Anac..Mind, irritability: Marked irritability; disturbed by everything; cursing.
Anac..Mind, restlessness, nervousness: Full of internal anxiety. No peace. He is separated from the whole world, and he despairs to do that which is required of him.
Anac..Skin: The eruptions are like Rhus in many respects; erysipelatous eruptions dark, dusky and of malignant types. It is an antidote to Rhus poisoning. Eruptions all over. Yellow vesicles are common. Intense itching of eruptions. Warts on the palms like Natrum mur. Skin burns much. It seems closely related in its symptoms to all the Rhus family.
Anac..Stomach: Many complaints are ameliorated by eating.
Anac..Stomach, pain: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.
Anac..Abdomen, pain: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.
Anac..Generalities, pain: Sensation here and there of pressure, described as if a plug, all through the body, in the head, eyes, in the navel and down the spine.
Anac..Generalities, side: That strange forms accompany him, one to his right side and one to his left.
Anac..Generalities, weakness: Full of trembling and paralytic weakness.
Anac..Mind, restlessness: Full of internal anxiety. No peace. He is separated from the whole world, and he despairs to do that which is required of him.
Anac..Appetite: Many complaints are ameliorated by eating.
